_doc: Final EN+AR rename mapping for the 17 duplicate-title groups. modifier is inserted after the given name in EN and at the end of AR (Arabic adjective follows the noun).

overrides_for_auto_resolved.reason: variant Color said 'red' but the velvet is visually burgundy/plum
auto picked 'black' (the bisht), but A50 also has black bisht — daraa is the distinguishing cream/ivory
